name: indeed-search-page
description: User pastes an Indeed search-results URL with vjk=<id> (the currently-selected job on the listing). normalizeUrl should rewrite it to /viewjob?jk=<id> before we hit Firecrawl, so the stub only needs to match the canonical form.

data.markdown:
# Senior DevOps Engineer - Remote

**OrbitPay** — Remote (US)

$160,000 - $200,000 a year

## The role

OrbitPay is hiring a Senior DevOps Engineer to own our AWS platform and developer tooling. You will shape our infrastructure roadmap and mentor engineers across the company.

## What you'll do

- Design and operate AWS multi-region infrastructure with Terraform
- Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for 40+ services
- Lead incident response and run game-days
- Partner with security on SOC2 and PCI compliance

## Requirements

- 6+ years in SRE / platform / DevOps roles
- Expert-level AWS and Terraform
- Strong Python or Go
- Experience with Kubernetes, Datadog, PagerDuty

metadata.title: Senior DevOps Engineer - OrbitPay - Remote | Indeed.com
